title: Model monitoring & drift detection setup
description: Extend existing ML monitoring (scripts/ml_ops/) with win probability specific checks: prediction calibration drift, feature distribution drift (KS test), latency monitoring. Add to weekly health check workflow.

florentino_gate.reason: Monitoring infrastructure supports ML Rigor score. Required for responsible model deployment.

build.notes: win_prob_monitoring.py created (~600 lines). WinProbMonitor class with 5 check methods: Brier drift, feature KS test, calibration bins, phase performance, health report generation. Integrated into run_health_check.py (2 new steps). Baseline templates created.

domain_sanity.notes: Jose Mourinho: YES — KS threshold 0.1 is standard, Brier thresholds (0.22 degraded, 0.25 critical) are justified. Andy Flower: YES — phase-specific monitoring (PP/middle/death) captures cricket-relevant drift. Pep Guardiola: YES — reuses existing AlertLevel/Alert patterns, structurally coherent.

enforcement.notes: Tom Brady: Loop followed. Monitoring respects experimental status — no model loading, framework only. Integrates cleanly with existing health check pipeline.

system_check.notes: N'Golo Kante: run_health_check.py updated with graceful degradation (try/except). ml-health-check.yml trigger paths expanded. Baseline templates created. No regressions in existing monitoring.

post_task_note.what_changed: Win probability monitoring framework added. Brier score drift detection, feature distribution KS tests, calibration bin monitoring, phase-specific performance tracking. Integrated into existing health check runner and GitHub Actions workflow.
post_task_note.assumption_tested: Existing model_monitoring.py patterns (AlertLevel, Alert, FeatureDriftResult) can be composed for new model types — confirmed.
post_task_note.risk_introduced: Baseline templates are placeholders — must be replaced with actual training distributions after first model run.
post_task_note.usp: Proactive model health monitoring prevents silent degradation. Phase-specific checks catch cricket-relevant drift that aggregate metrics would miss.

2026-02-28T01:30:00Z.detail: Created win_prob_monitoring.py following existing patterns. WinProbMonitor composes ModelMonitor for feature drift. 5 core checks. Integrated into run_health_check.py (Steps 5 and 7). GitHub workflow updated.

2026-02-28T02:00:00Z.detail: All gates passed. Board updated. Monitoring framework ready — baselines need population after first model run.
